description: Inject project context at session start / after compaction. Phrased as declarative facts (not imperatives) so it is not mistaken for prompt injection. stdout on SessionStart is added to Claude's context.

hooks.command: bash -c 'b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); b=$(printf "%s" "$b" | tr -cd "A-Za-z0-9._/-"); [ -n "$b" ] || b=unknown; echo "Current branch: $b. This project uses pixi and lefthook; tests run via pixi run test."'
